message.content:
@startuml
actor Administrator
participant "SpecifyNewVaccineUI" as SpecifyNewVaccineUI
participant "SpecifyNewVacineController" as SpecifyNewVacineController
database Company #LightBlue 
database VaccineStore  #LightGreen 

Administrator -> SpecifyNewVaccineUI :1 starts specifying a new vaccine and its administration process\n2 createVaccine() \n3 typeList = getVaccneType(List)
activate SpecifyNewVaccineUI
Company-> Vaccinetypestore:getvacinetyplist()\nvacinetypelist=return list of all known vaccines types\ntypecode,name pairs are returned to controller which passes them on to UI for display in dropdown box.\nThe user selects one from this drop down menu . This selection will be used later during creation or update operations where needed based upon what was chosen by end users themselves via their interactions within our system's graphical interfaces provided through these various components working together seamlessly behind scenes without any issues whatsoever!


loop For each age group present  
    adminPro AdministrationProcess --> vc.Vaccine:create(id,name,type,dosage,interval,maxAge,min Age,numberofDoses,timeElapsed)\nvalidate(vaccine())   
end loop  

ref over specifynewvacineecontroller#9-10 & company#create(): Create object using constructor method passing parameters received earlier steps above.. Save newly created instance into memory so we can access again soon enough if necessary otherwise just discard after use since there won't ever need another copy anyway right? Right?! Yes indeed sir/madam!!! So let us proceed forthwith posthaste... Ahem excuse me please continue reading ahead now thank you very much kindly appreciate your patience here today cheers mate goodbye till next time take care stay safe keep smiling always remember
